effects.effect: Add 1 [Bird] or AIR Vivosaur from your Deck to your Hand.

effects.name: Weird Squi Entrance!
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur is played: apply Confuse vivosaur andcharge 1 [Bird] Vivosaur from your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Mighty Gust
effects.effect: You can return this Vivosaur to your hand, then play a non-Wind [Bird] Vivosaur from your Hand.
